Date Encoder

Tap dates to toggle. The encoding is a hex value representing a 39-bit selection mask (fixed date order, earliest to latest).

April 0 selected

May 0 selected

June 0 selected

Format: 0x + hex for the 39-bit mask. Bit 0 corresponds to the first date in order (Apr 2), bit 38 to the last (Jun 27).
Selected: 0 / 39
